title: Multi-Function Manual Food Chopper & Processors with Handle and Cover,Vegetable Chopper Shredder,Garlic Chopper,Suitable for Onions Garlic Peppers Carrots Fruits,Wonderful for Kitchen(Green)
features: [Strong and Durable]: This mini food processors is made of food-grade PP plastic, which can safely produce a variety of food for your family. The blade is made of stainless steel which can even make the minced meat easily, and the overall structure is very strong.

[Operation Steps]: 1. Cut the food into small pieces then put it in the box; 2. Close and tighten the lid towards the left ; 3. Pull the handle several times to chop the food; 4.Pour out the chopped food from the food chopper and put it into the bowl. This vegetable chopper is suitable for cutting celery, ginger, carrots, tomatoes, onions, garlic, peppers, fruits and meat, etc.

[Design Details]: This food chopper adopts an ergonomic design. You can press the body of the chopper with one hand and pull the pull-tab with the other hand to ensure not shake while using. The capacity is 500ml, which can meet the needs of processing different food at the same time. The weight of the product is only 210g, which is very light,It is easy to carry and you can store it in anywhere. The pull-tab design of the handle prevents slipping during use.

[Easy to Clean]:The blade, cover and bottom body of this vegetable cutter are detachable for easy cleaning,It can be rinsed under running water, but it cannot be rinsed in a dishwasher, moreover,in order to avoid residual food residue becoming hardened, it is recommended to rinse with water after using directly.

[Suitable for Kitchen]: This highly efficient and multifunctional vegetable cutter is not only suitable for home kitchens, but also for professional kitchens. It can be used to chop vegetables, fruits, meat, etc.It is a good helper for the kitchen.
description: Product Description Ideal gift for your family！ This vegetable cutter is unexceptionable.It is not only exquisite, but also light in weight, easy to store, and does not take up too much space.It is a great gift for you family and friends. Excellent design： This manual food processors adopted a new design with handle and lid, which will increase the fun of cooking, making the original boring work full of fun, and improving the efficiency for cooking, saving more time for you to accompany your family and friends! The top cover, blade can be separated: The top cover,blade can be separated, It is easy to clean.It can be rinsed under running water, but it is not suitable for washing in the dishwasher.In order to avoid residual food residue becoming hardened, it is recommended to rinse with water after using directly. It's really a multifunctional tool. This mini manual food processors in accordance with ergonomic design,you will find it’s comfortable when using,Just needs a slight strength and will get the fresh crushed garlic what you want.Not only can be used to make mincing garlic,but also can be used to chopper Onion,Peanut,Mushroom,Pepper,Ginger,Meat etc;which can meet many different needs for cooking. How to use it? 1. Cut the food into small pieces and put it in the box.2. Close and tighten the lid towards the left .3. Pull the handle several times to chop the food.4. Then pour the chopped food into the bowl. Nylon rope The pull rope is made of nylon, which is very durable. Convenient to use The small hole in the upper of cover makes it easy for you to add soy sauce and other seasonings while cutting meat Stainless steel blade Stainless steel blades allow you to easily chop up any vegetable or fruit. Removable top cover The top cover is designed to be removable for you to add vegetables and clean easily.
